contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: Mycelial Economy + Signal Brief #1: expanded the Mycelial Economy essay with a Pareto-curated five-ecosystem signals section (wider culture, nomadic circuit, library workshops, founder ecosystem, supply-chain partners), narrowed the anti-AI claim to the nomadic circuit, corrected June Jo's bibimbap (not kimchi) and added her national library tour, integrated Rob Reich's automate-vs-augment normative frame from the Stanford AI and the Future of Work meetup as the structural backbone (with two of his slides), and corrected the post's Stanford reference to its actual content (AI polling lower than ICE). Launched Signal Brief as a sibling series to Field Signals — same DAO sensing organ, institutional voice — and shipped Signal Brief #1 as a text-density compilation of the same signals, designed for short-link sharing into Beer Hall. PR #58 squash-merged into main on truesight_me_beta. Live URLs: truesight.me/blog/posts/the-mycelial-economy.html and truesight.me/blog/posts/signal-brief-01-experience-economy.html.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
